typography.h1: text-7xl md:text-9xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none uppercase
typography.caption: text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-red-500

visual_enhancers.grain_overlay: opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay
visual_enhancers.gradient_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-200 to-slate-500

buttons.primary: bg-[#C0002A] hover:bg-[#E60032] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold tracking-widest uppercase transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(192,0,42,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#C0002A] hover:text-[#C0002A] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold tracking-widest uppercase transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

cards.service_card: group relative p-8 h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 hover:border-[#C0002A]/50 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden

universal_guidelines: FORCE DARK MODE: This is a 'Dark Forge' aesthetic. Ensure the <html> tag has class='dark' and background is set to #050508.
NO GENERIC CARDS: Do not use standard white cards. Use glassmorphism or invisible borders.
ASYMMETRY IS KING: Do not center the portfolio grid. Use the 'Tetris' bento grid layout.
RED IS SACRED: Use the primary red (#C0002A) SPARINLGY. Only for main CTAs and key accents. Do not flood the UI with red.
TYPOGRAPHY CONTRAST: Use huge, bold, condensed uppercase headings vs small, clean, light body text.
INTERACTIVITY: Every button must have a hover state (glow, lift, color shift). The cursor should be a custom glowing red dot.
NAVIGATION: Sticky glassmorphism header with a subtle red bottom border (1px) on scroll.
FORMS: Inputs should be transparent with bottom borders only, animating to red on focus.
DATA TEST ID: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'contact-submit-btn').
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion'. 2. Configure Tailwind with the provided colors. 3. Create a layout wrapper that enforces the dark theme and adds the grain overlay. 4. Build the Hero section with a custom animated geometric background (CSS or Framer Motion). 5. Implement the 'Tetris' grid for the portfolio. 6. Use the provided image URLs strictly.
